message:
🌱 Add headlamp: Mac M1 application does not launch mission (#803)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "headlamp-3916-mac-m1-application-does-not-launch",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "headlamp: Mac M1 application does not launch",
+    "description": "Mac M1 application does not launch. This issue affects 8+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify headlamp troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your headlamp deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp -n headlamp --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review headlamp configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant headlamp configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp\nkubectl get configmap -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=headlamp\n```\nUPDATE: See https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/headlamp/issues/3916#issuecomment-3308142475 for the fix. The issue is the fact the app is unsigned, as called out in the [documentation](https://headlamp.dev/docs/latest/installation/desktop/)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Mac M1 application does not launch",
+        "description": "- **Updated `app/package.json`**: Implemented ad-hoc signing by setting `identity: \"-\"`.\n- **Infrastructure**: Enabled \"Deep\" signing to recursively sign the Electron wrapper, frameworks, and the bundled Go backend (`headlamp-server`).\n- **Security Logic**: Disabled `hardenedRuntime` for macOS\n```yaml\ncd app && npm run package -- --mac --arm64\n3. **Verify Signature**:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Mac M1 application does not launch is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp -n headlamp --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n headlamp --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "- **Updated `app/package.json`**: Implemented ad-hoc signing by setting `identity: \"-\"`.\n- **Infrastructure**: Enabled \"Deep\" signing to recursively sign the Electron wrapper, frameworks, and the bundled Go backend (`headlamp-server`).\n- **Security Logic**: Disabled `hardenedRuntime` for macOS builds to ensure compatibility with ad-hoc (non-notari",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "cd app && npm run package -- --mac --arm64\n3. **Verify Signature**:",
+        "~> xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine /Applications/Headlamp.app\noption -r not recognized\n...\n\n~> which xattr\n/Users/sam/.pyenv/shims/xattr # <--- FML\n\n~> /usr/bin/xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine /Applications/Headlamp.app\n# Success"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "headlamp",
+      "sandbox",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "headlamp"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/headlamp/issues/3916",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/headlamp",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/headlamp/pull/4533"
+    },
+    "reactions": 8,
+    "comments": 13,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with headlamp installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:34:46.285Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
